text.title: client-conventions-reverse-engineering Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the client-conventions-reverse-engineering methodology end-to-end.

step.name: read-explicit-configs
step.action: List every lint/formatter/tsconfig/pyproject file; capture rules of note.

step.name: sample-merged-prs
step.action: Pull >= 20 recent merged PRs across >= 5 authors; extract naming + commit + branching patterns.

step.name: infer-implicit-rules
step.action: Synthesize naming / structure / test-placement patterns; flag ambiguity.

step.name: compose-guardrail
step.action: Author single repo-rules.md with 6 canonical sections; each rule cites a source.

step.name: validate-and-deploy
step.action: Run validator; commit to client repo at root (or fork); feed to agent system context.
